zh.Sible Hedingham, Essex, England: 英國英格蘭艾可希布爾 丁加姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Antiocha Hawkwood於1351年出生在英國艾可希布爾 丁加姆時，她的父親Sir John Hawkwood II29歲，母親Mrs. John Hawkwood27歲。她於1379年3月之前與Sir William Coggeshall ,Knight結婚。他們至少是4個女兒的父母。她去世於1386年之後在英國艾可。

zh-hans.Sible Hedingham, Essex, England: 英国英格兰艾可希布爾 丁加姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Antiocha Hawkwood于1351年出生在英国艾可希布爾 丁加姆时，她的父亲Sir John Hawkwood II29岁，母亲Mrs. John Hawkwood27岁。她于1379年3月之前与Sir William Coggeshall ,Knight结婚。他们至少是4个女儿的父母。她去世于1386年之后在英国艾可。

nameMeanings.name: Hawkwood
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from some minor place named as ‘the hawk wood’, e.g. Hawkwoods in Sible Hedingham or Hawkwood’s Farm in Gosfield (both Essex).

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Antiocha Hawkwood was born in 1351, in Sible Hedingham, Essex, England, her father, Sir John Hawkwood II, was 29 and her mother, Mrs. John Hawkwood, was 27. She married Sir William Coggeshall ,Knight before March 1379. They were the parents of at least 4 daughters. She died after 1386, in Essex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Antiocha Hawkwood est née en 1351, à Sible Hedingham, Essex, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Hawkwood II, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Mrs. John Hawkwood, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William Coggeshall ,Knight avant mars 1379. Ils ont eu au moins 4 filles. Elle est décédée après 1386, à Essex, Angleterre.

de.Sible Hedingham, Essex, England: Sible Hedingham, Essex, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Antiocha Hawkwood 1351 in Sible Hedingham, Essex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Hawkwood II 29 und ihre Mutter Mrs. John Hawkwood 27. Sie hat vor März 1379 Sir William Coggeshall ,Knight geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Töchter. Sie starb nach 1386 in Essex, England.

Lei sposato Sir William Coggeshall ,Knight prima del marzo 1379. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figlie. Morì dopo il 1386, nel Essex, England.

ja.Bocking, Essex, England: イギリスエセックスボクイング
ja.lifeSummary: Antiocha Hawkwoodが1351年にイギリスエセックスシブル ヘディンガムで生まれた時，父Sir John Hawkwood IIは29歳，母Mrs. John Hawkwoodは27歳であった。1379年3月以前にSir William Coggeshall ,Knightと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1386年以後にイギリスエセックスで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Antiocha Hawkwood(이)가 1351년 영국 에세스 시블일 헤딩함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Hawkwood II(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs. John Hawkwood(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1379년 3월 이전 Sir William Coggeshall ,Knight(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1386년 이후 영국 에세스에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Antiocha Hawkwood nasceu em 1351, em Sible Hedingham, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Hawkwood II, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. John Hawkwood, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William Coggeshall ,Knight antes março de 1379. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhas. Ela faleceu após 1386, em Essex, Inglaterra.

ro.Sible Hedingham, Essex, England: Sible Hedingham, Essex, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Antiocha Hawkwood родилась в 1351 г. в местности сибл хедингхам, эссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir John Hawkwood II было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. John Hawkwood, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Coggeshall ,Knight перед марта 1379 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 дочери. Она умерла после 1386 г. в местности эссекс, Англия.
